sentences.arabic: يَقُومُ الْمُجْتَمَعُ الْإِسْلَامِيُّ عَلَى رَكِيزَةِ الْمَحَبَّةِ وَالتَّكَافُلِ بَيْنَ أَفْرَادِهِ، حَيْثُ حَثَّ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ عَلَى نَزْعِ الْأَنَانِيَّةِ مِنَ النُّفُوسِ.
sentences.translation: Islamsko društvo se zasniva na stubu ljubavi i uzajamne solidarnosti među njegovim članovima, jer je Vjerovjesnik, s.a.v.s., podsticao na iskorjenjivanje sebičnosti iz duša.
sentences.translationEn: Islamic society is built on the pillar of love and mutual solidarity among its members, as the Prophet (PBUH) urged for the removal of selfishness from the souls.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللهِ ﷺ: «لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ، رَقْمُ ١٣].
sentences.translation: Allahov Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je rekao: 'Niko od vas neće biti pravi vjernik dok ne bude želio svome bratu ono što želi samome sebi' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o imanu, br. 13].
sentences.translationEn: The Messenger of Allah (PBUH) said: 'None of you believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Faith, No. 13].

sentences.arabic: يُشِيرُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ إِلَى كَمَالِ الْإِيمَانِ الْوَاجِبِ، إِذْ لَا يَكْتَمِلُ إِيمَانُ الْعَبْدِ حَتَّى يَتَمَنَّى لِغَيْرِهِ مِنَ الْخَيْرِ مَا يَتَمَنَّاهُ لِذَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis ukazuje na obavezno savršenstvo imana, jer robov iman nije potpun dok drugima ne poželi isto dobro koje želi sebi.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith refers to the mandatory perfection of faith, as a servant's faith is not complete until he wishes for others the same good he wishes for himself.

sentences.arabic: وَيُوَضِّحُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ أَنَّ هَذَا يَشْمَلُ الْأُمُورَ الدِّينِيَّةَ وَالدُّنْيَوِيَّةَ عَلَى حَدٍّ سَوَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Uthaymeen objašnjava da se ovo podjednako odnosi na vjerska i dunjalučka pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen explains that this includes both religious and worldly matters alike.

sentences.arabic: فَإِذَا رَأَى الْمُسْلِمُ نِعْمَةً عِنْدَ أَخِيهِ، فَلَا يَحْسَدُهُ بَلْ يَفْرَحُ لَهُ وَيَدْعُو لَهُ بِالْبَرَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ako musliman vidi blagodat kod svog brata, ne treba mu zavidjeti, već se radovati zbog njega i moliti za bereket.
sentences.translationEn: If a Muslim sees a blessing with his brother, he should not envy him, but rather rejoice for him and pray for blessing.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَطْبِيقَ هَذَا الْمَبْدَأِ يُؤَدِّي إِلَى تَمَاسُكِ الْأُمَّةِ وَانْتِشَارِ السَّلَامِ وَالْوِئَامِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Primjena ovog principa vodi ka koheziji ummeta i širenju mira i sloge među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: The application of this principle leads to the cohesion of the Ummah and the spread of peace and harmony among people.
